name: 01-nasa-iss069-florida-from-orbit-5568x3712.jpg
note: NASA ISS Expedition 69 — Florida from the International Space Station. Public domain. The single best candidate for the Scene 1 hero base layer: dark blue Gulf, peninsular outline, real photograph from orbit.

name: 02-nasa-aqua-florida-peninsula-4000x4000.jpg
note: NASA Aqua satellite — full Florida peninsula at 250m/pixel. Public domain. Use for the wider "zoom out" beat of Scene 1, or as a stylized base for the data-river map in Scene 2.

name: 03-nasa-landsat-tampa-gulf-2196x2196.jpg
note: NASA Landsat 7 ETM+ — Tampa Bay + Gulf coast (the next zone north of SWFL). Public domain. Crop to SWFL portion for an alt hero candidate; coastline detail is sharper than the ISS shot.

name: 04-nasa-iss041-florida-coast-2128x1416.jpg
note: NASA ISS Expedition 41 — Florida coast from orbit, different lighting/angle than [01]. Public domain. Alt hero candidate or transition frame.

name: 05-nasa-modis-florida-1956x1372.jpg
note: NASA MODIS — Florida from low-orbit. Public domain. Wider context shot; useful as a Scene 2 "data river flowing outward from the coast" base if you flatten and recolor.

name: 06-florida-platform-bathymetry-2000x1125.jpg
note: Florida Platform bathymetric map (Earth@Home, university-edu source). Shows the carbonate shelf SWFL sits on — perfect reference for the "stylized 3D topographic map" call in the script. Likely free for educational use; verify license before publishing.

name: 07-wikimedia-cape-coral-canals-2816x2112.jpg
note: Cape Coral canal network aerial. Wikimedia Commons (Creative Commons — attribution required). Directly maps to Scene 1 callout "SBA loan cluster in Cape Coral" — the canal grid IS the visual signature of Cape Coral. High-res, real photo.

name: 08-prodrones-fort-myers-beach-dji-2560x1706.webp
note: Fort Myers Beach DJI drone HDR shot (prodrones.com). Editorial-quality, no obvious watermark in the file, but the rights are with prodrones — license check required before use. High-res FMB aerial, post-Ian rebuild era.

name: 09-naples-news-5th-ave-south-5472x3648.jpg
note: Naples 5th Avenue South — Naples Daily News editorial. 5472x3648, very high res. Editorial license required — Naples News for any public use. Pristine reference for the Scene 6 "downtown Naples + Fort Myers skyline" column.

name: 10-gulfshore-business-naples-1024x576.jpg
note: Naples downtown from Gulfshore Business — editorial. Lower res than [09]. Use as a secondary if [09] cant be licensed.

name: 11-nasa-gulf-of-mexico-phytoplankton-4104x2304.png
note: NASA Goddard SVS — Gulf of Mexico phytoplankton bloom (false-color). Public domain. The swirl pattern reads abstract/dark and would work as a Scene 7 footer water texture if you desaturate to gulf-midnight (#0A1419). 4104x2304 PNG.

name: alamy-fort-myers-beach-aerial-comp-1300x956.jpg
note: Alamy stock comp — Fort Myers Beach aerial. Watermarked, REFERENCE ONLY. License via Alamy before use.

name: alamy-fmb-sanibel-estero-bay-comp-1300x956.jpg
note: Alamy stock comp — FMB + Sanibel + Estero Bay context shot. The single best location-bundle frame in the search results. Watermarked, REFERENCE ONLY.

name: alamy-marco-island-aerial-comp-1300x956.jpg
note: Alamy stock comp — Marco Island aerial. Watermarked, REFERENCE ONLY.

name: alamy-sanibel-san-carlos-bay-comp-1300x956.jpg
note: Alamy stock comp — Sanibel + San Carlos Bay + Tarpon Bay. Watermarked, REFERENCE ONLY.

name: alamy-sanibel-captiva-pair-comp-1300x956.jpg
note: Alamy stock comp — Sanibel + Captiva pair from above. Watermarked, REFERENCE ONLY.

name: alamy-estero-bay-comp-1300x952.jpg
note: Alamy stock comp — Estero Bay direct. Watermarked, REFERENCE ONLY. Maps to the Scene 1 "Storm surge risk rings around Estero Bay" callout.

name: alamy-fmb-sunset-comp-1300x843.jpg
note: Alamy stock comp — FMB at sunset. Watermarked, REFERENCE ONLY. Good mood reference for the dark/atmospheric tone the script calls for.
